betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The Testificates have been quite reticent at answering my question on this matter, but it is now evident that some of their kind actively worship the Meatball Man.
What does their god offer them, what does he promise them to have gained their worship? A great banquet? Earthly pleasures? A promise of Power?
If the Testificates are remaining silet, the Bees have been substantially more loose-tongued. Their powers allowed them to delve into the cult of the Meatball Man, unveiling some if its secrets.
A powerful envoy of the Lord of Gluttony was sent to them, likely for protection, and possibly for retaliation against enemies, such as me. 
Thanks to the intelligence from the Bees, I was able to unveil this envoy, this harbinger. 
The power at the Meatball Man's disposal is turning out to be quite the devastating one. Multiple, albeit missionless, fractallites, planet-destroying hungering flesh, direct control over many of the Elder Ones. The might of an empire.
And yet, as far as I know, no imperialistic tendencies. All of this, just to fight the Arbiter, to fight Terra.
